name: Christmas Fruit Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Mixed dark and light raisins
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Mix flour, baking powder, and salt together in a bowl.
3. Rub in the margarine until the mixture resembles fine breadcrumbs.
4. Add fruit, nuts, orange rind, carrots, and spices; mix well.
5. Dissolve sweetener in eggs, then beat into the dry ingredients.
6. Add enough orange juice to form a soft dough.
7. Place the mixture in an 8-inch round or 7x7-inch nonstick cake pan.
8. Bake for 45-60 minutes (or use a larger pan and reduce cooking time) until firm to touch and a toothpick comes out clean.
9. Allow the cake to cool in the pan.
10. Turn the cake upside down; make a few holes with a toothpick, then spoon in any leftover orange juice and alcohol if used.
11. Store the cake in an airtight container.
12. Suggested icing: apples and cottage cheese.
Note: Each slice contains 180 calories, 20 grams of carbohydrates (2 bread/starch exchanges), 4 grams of fiber, 5 grams of protein, and 9 grams of fat.
